method: Weighted Boxes Fusion ensemble of banana_real_v5.pt (YOLOv8m) + banana_real_v7.pt (YOLO11m) + banana_real_v8.pt (YOLO11m)
eval_method: held-out test (50 images, 1166 plants), imgsz 1024, conf 0.22, greedy IoU>=0.5 matching
note: Best precision of the model line (0.928 -> fewest false positives) at the same F1 as the 2-model ensemble. Fusing three models trades a little recall for precision. Cost: runs three models (~3x inference). Single farm/region; recalibrate per farm for deployment.
